subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, through which Thou hast adorned the brocade of the Book of Creation, to cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به زینت دیباج کتاب الابداع بان تجعل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
